description: Create a 3D Sun Path Diagram (Heliodon) for Seattle, WA (47.6° N) in GeoGebra. Construct a 3D geometric model showing the sun's path for the Summer Solstice (offset by +23.44°), Equinox (centered at the origin), and Winter Solstice (offset by -23.44°). The system must be oriented for Seattle's latitude with the axis of rotation angled at 47.6° from the North Horizon. Include a visual representation of the Horizon (such as the xy-plane). Save the file as 'seattle_sun_path.ggb' in ~/Documents/GeoGebra/projects/.
